nasb.text: The whole allotment shall be 25,000 by 25,000 cubits; you shall set apart the holy allotment, a square, with the property of the city.

esv.text: The whole portion that you shall set apart shall be 25,000 cubits square, that is, the holy portion together with the property of the city.

cnv.text: 所獻的整個地區，長十二公里半，寬十二公里半，是見方的。你們要把所獻的聖區，連同城的基業，一起獻上。

ccb.text: 你们所献的这块圣地和城区是方形的，四面各长十二点五公里。
